title: Pake CLI config file
description: Declarative config for `pake --config <path>`. Fields mirror the camelCase CLI options; an explicit CLI flag always wins over a config field. Invocation concerns (--json, --config) are CLI-only.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this schema for editor validation.

url.description: Web URL, local HTML file, or local directory to package. A positional CLI argument wins over this field.

identifier.description: Application identifier / bundle ID. Derived from url and name when omitted.

icon.description: Application icon path or URL. Fetched from the site favicon when omitted.

useLocalFile.description: When url is a local file, recursively copy its sibling files into the app.

hideTitleBar.description: macOS only: hide title bar (immersive header).

hideWindowDecorations.description: Windows/Linux only: hide native window decorations.

multiArch.description: macOS only: build a universal binary for both Intel and Apple Silicon.

inject.description: Local CSS/JS file paths injected into the page.

proxyUrl.description: Proxy URL for all network requests (http://, https://, socks5://).

targets.description: Build target format. Linux: deb/appimage/rpm/zst and *-arm64 variants (comma-separated allowed); Windows: x64/arm64; macOS: intel/apple/universal/app/dmg. Defaults to the platform installer format.

appVersion.description: App version written into the bundle.

alwaysOnTop.description: Keep the window always on top.

activationShortcut.description: Global shortcut that activates the app window.

hideOnClose.description: Hide the window on close instead of exiting. Defaults to true on macOS, false elsewhere.

incognito.description: Launch in incognito/private mode (no persisted cookies or storage).

keepBinary.description: Keep the raw binary alongside the installer.

bundle.description: Linux only: false skips packaging and outputs the raw executable (CLI: --no-bundle).

multiWindow.description: Allow opening multiple windows in one instance.

forceInternalNavigation.description: Keep every link inside the Pake window.

internalUrlRegex.description: Regex for URLs treated as internal navigation.

safeDomain.description: Comma-separated domains kept inside the app (e.g. SSO callbacks).

enableFind.description: Enable in-page Find UI with Cmd/Ctrl+F/G.

iterativeBuild.description: Rapid build mode (app only, no dmg/deb/msi), for debugging.

newWindow.description: Allow sites to open new windows (auth flows, tabs).

install.description: macOS only: move the built app into /Applications.
